subject: Fw: Emailing: IMG_1296, IMG_1293, IMG_1294, IMG_1295
body:
Where is this table for? What do I tell valdson to do w/it?

Sent via BlackBerry by AT&T

-----Original Message-----
From: Valdson COTRIN <valdson.cotrin@free.fr>

Date: Thu, 15 Nov 2007 15:21:59 
To:Ghislaine <gmax1@mindspring.com>
Subject: Emailing: IMG_1296, IMG_1293, IMG_1294, IMG_1295


madame bonjour.
voici les photos de la table qui monsieur a achettez. pouvez me dire 
q'est que je doit en faire.
respectueusement.
valdson.Your files are attached and ready to send with this message.
